zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia de   Ashton於1372年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，她的父親Sir John de Ashton II32歲，母親Lady Anne de Standish24歲。她於1390年與Sir Richard Radcliffe結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1429年3月27日在英國藍卡爾澤福頓享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia de   Ashton于1372年出生在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林时，她的父亲Sir John de Ashton II32岁，母亲Lady Anne de Standish24岁。她于1390年与Sir Richard Radcliffe结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1429年3月27日在英国藍卡爾澤福頓享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia de   Ashton was born in 1372, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir John de Ashton II, was 32 and her mother, Lady Anne de Standish, was 24. She married Sir Richard Radcliffe in 1390. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 27 March 1429, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia de   Ashton est née en 1372, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Ashton II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne de Standish, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Radcliffe en 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1429, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia de   Ashton 1372 in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Ashton II 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne de Standish 24. Sie hat 1390 Sir Richard Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1429 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de   Ashton è nata il nel 1372 nel Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Ashton II, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne de Standish, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Radcliffe nel 1390. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1429, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia de   Ashton(이)가 1372년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Ashton II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne de Standish(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1390년 Sir Richard Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1429년 3월 27일 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de   Ashton nasceu em 1372, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Ashton II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne de Standish, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Radcliffe em 1390. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1429, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia de   Ashton родилась в 1372 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Ashton II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne de Standish, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Radcliffe в 1390 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 27 марта 1429 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia de   Ashton nació en 1372, en Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Ashton II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Anne de Standish, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Radcliffe en 1390. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1429, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
